basic_details.job_title: IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Banaras Hindu University (IIT BHU) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT BHU. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: As per GoI rules for SC/ST/Physically Handicapped/Female candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E. / M.Tech (or equivalent) in Electronics and Communication Engineering/ Microelectronics/ VLSI/ Embedded Systems/ Applied Electronics with min 60% marks or 6.0 CPI and valid GATE EC, B.E. / B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering with min 75% marks or 7.5 CPI and valid GATE EC, B.E. / B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering with min 70% marks or 7.0 CPI and valid GATE EC (with >2 years professional experience from Central Govt funded institution)
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.E. / M.Tech (or equivalent degree) in Electronics and Communication Engineering/ Microelectronics/ VLSI/ Embedded Systems/ Applied Electronics, with minimum of 60 % marks or 6.0 CPI, AND having a valid GATE score in EC (OR) B.E. / B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with minimum of 75 % marks or 7.5 CPI, AND having a valid GATE score in EC. (OR) B.E. / B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with minimum of 70 % marks or 7.0 CPI, AND having a valid GATE score in EC if applicant has more than two years of professional experience, provided the B.E. / B.Tech degree is from an Institution funded by the Central Government.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000 + 20% HRA = Rs. 44,400 per month (for first two years) and Rs. 42,000 + 20% HRA = Rs. 50,400 per month (from third year onwards).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.iit_banaras_hindu_university_iit_bhu: M.E. / M.Tech (or equivalent) in Electronics and Communication Engineering/ Microelectronics/ VLSI/ Embedded Systems/ Applied Electronics with min 60% marks or 6.0 CPI and valid GATE EC, B.E. / B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering with min 75% marks or 7.5 CPI and valid GATE EC, B.E. / B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering with min 70% marks or 7.0 CPI and valid GATE EC (with >2 years professional experience from Central Govt funded institution)

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.E. / M.Tech (or equivalent degree) in Electronics and Communication Engineering/ Microelectronics/ VLSI/ Embedded Systems/ Applied Electronics, with minimum of 60 % marks or 6.0 CPI, AND having a valid GATE score in EC (OR) B.E. / B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with minimum of 75 % marks or 7.5 CPI, AND having a valid GATE score in EC. (OR) B.E. / B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with minimum of 70 % marks or 7.0 CPI, AND having a valid GATE score in EC if applicant has more than two years of professional experience, provided the B.E. / B.Tech degree is from an Institution funded by the Central Government.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 35 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: As per GoI rules for SC/ST/Physically Handicapped/Female candidates.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000 + 20% HRA = Rs. 44,400 per month (for first two years) and Rs. 42,000 + 20% HRA = Rs. 50,400 per month (from third year onwards).

rows.event: Last Date for sending the application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Junior Research Fellow post at IIT BHU is 09 July 2026. Candidates must send their applications via email before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Research Fellow posts at IIT BHU?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post in the IIT Banaras Hindu University recruitment drive for 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Junior Research Fellow posts at IIT BHU. Candidates can apply for free.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT BHU?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for a Junior Research Fellow at IIT BHU?
faq.answer: The salary for a Junior Research Fellow is Rs. 37,000 + 20% HRA (Rs. 44,400 per month) for the first two years, increasing to Rs. 42,000 + 20% HRA (Rs. 50,400 per month) from the third year onwards.

faq.question: Q6. What is the required qualification for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need an M.E./M.Tech (or equivalent) in ECE/Microelectronics/VLSI/Embedded Systems/Applied Electronics with 60% marks and a valid GATE EC score, or a B.E./B.Tech in ECE with 75% marks and a valid GATE EC score.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial email application, followed by shortlisting of eligible candidates, and then an interview round for the shortlisted applicants.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply by sending their complete application, including bio-data and self-attested documents, via email to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Banaras Hindu University is a contractual job type. The duration of the contract will be specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The job location for the Junior Research Fellow position is Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, specifically at IIT Banaras Hindu University, with pincode 221005.
